title: vatica oblongifolia subsp. multinervosa
intro: Vatica oblongifolia subsp. multinervosa, also known as the Malaysian mountain meranti, is a subspecies of tree native to Malaysia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Vatica oblongifolia subsp. multinervosa include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being.
